```json
  "preconditions": [
    "wrapper must be a callable",
    "wrapped must be a callable",

  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "wrapper.__module__ is updated to wrapped.__module__",
    "wrapper.__name__ is updated to wrapped.__name__",
    "wrapper.__qualname__ is updated to wrapped.__qualname__",

    "wrapper.__type_params__ is updated to wrapped.__type_params__",
    "wrapper.__dict__ is updated with wrapped.__dict__"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "wrapper and wrapped are the same function",
    "assigned or updated is an empty tuple",
    "wrapper or wrapped is not a callable"
  ]
}
```
